is.t: Full name of the person or business
Number only, e.g. 5000 Leave blank if none
"To Receive" → they owe you "To Pay" → you owe them
Max credit allowed, e.g. 10000 Leave blank for no limit
▼ Enter your contacts below — Row 5 onwards ▼

dataValidation.error: Please select "Customer" or "Supplier" from the dropdown.
dataValidation.prompt: Select "Customer" if they buy from you. Select "Supplier" if you buy from them.

dataValidation.error: "To Receive" = they owe you money. "To Pay" = you owe them money.
dataValidation.prompt: "To Receive" → Customer owes you (debit) "To Pay" → You owe supplier (credit) Leave blank if Opening Balance is 0.

dataValidation.error: Opening Balance must be a positive number or 0. Do not include Rs symbol or commas.
